form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Temora (19.22) in a Grade 5, finishing a 5.5 lengths fourth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Has ability and should feature.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 1.5 lengths at this track over 320m (18.07) beating Coco Davies in Grade 3/4 on April 10. Yet to be beaten in three starts out of this draw. Sure to go well.
